heading: Personal services in office of Speaker; payments
label: 5122 Personal services in office of Speaker; payments
text: There shall be paid from the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives until otherwise provided by law, for personal services in the office of the Speaker of the House, an additional basic sum of $10,000 per annum.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74–1 of this titleSection is based on House Resolution No. 487, Eighty-seventh Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Jan. 10, 1962Pub. L. 87–730
Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives” for “contingent fund of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives” for “contingent fund of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
